mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_daily_stats (gym_id, stat_date, total_members, active_members, dormant_members, routine_completed, attendance_rate, feedback_issued, feedback_used) SELECT #{gymId}, #{statDate}, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'MEMBER'), (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ms.user_id) FROM membership ms WHERE ms.end_date >= #{statDate}), GREATEST(0, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE role = 'MEMBER') - (SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ms2.user_id) FROM membership ms2 WHERE ms2.end_date >= #{statDate}) ), 0, 0.00, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_feedback_tickets WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND DATE(issued_at) = #{statDate}), (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM crm_feedback_tickets WHERE gym_id = #{gymId} AND status = 'used' AND DATE(used_at) = #{statDate}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_members = VALUES(total_members), active_members = VALUES(active_members), dormant_members = VALUES(dormant_members), feedback_issued = VALUES(feedback_issued), feedback_used = VALUES(feedback_used)
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT gym_id FROM crm_users ORDER BY gym_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO crm_daily_stats (gym_id, stat_date, total_members, active_members, dormant_members, routine_completed, attendance_rate, feedback_issued, feedback_used) VALUES (#{gymId}, #{statDate}, #{totalMembers}, #{activeMembers}, #{dormantMembers}, #{routineCompleted}, #{attendanceRate}, #{feedbackIssued}, #{feedbackUsed}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_members = VALUES(total_members), active_members = VALUES(active_members), dormant_members = VALUES(dormant_members), routine_completed = VALUES(routine_completed), attendance_rate = VALUES(attendance_rate), feedback_issued = VALUES(feedback_issued), feedback_used = VALUES(feedback_used)
